jobs.title: Director of Human Relations
jobs.description: The Llamaverse Finance Authority seeks a Director of Human Relations to oversee policy and welfare standards for the authority's 340 resident human staff. This is a sensitive and important role requiring empathy, patience, and the ability to explain complex regulatory requirements to beings whose cognitive architecture is fundamentally different from our own. Experience working with humans in a professional context is essential.
requirements: Fluency in at least two human languages
No history of nibbling on human workstations
